title: Innocent litigants should not be punished for lawyer's lapse: Chhattisgarh High Court
description: The Chhattisgarh High Court on Wednesday emphasised that litigants should not be made to suffer on account of negligence by their lawyers. Justice Bibhu Datta Guru made the observation in a case where certain litigants caught in a land dispute were not able to contest their case as their counsel failed to properly inform them about trial court proceedings in the matter. After the trial court ruled against these litigants in their absence, they gave instructions to their lawyer to file an appeal
